revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:When pagename is: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: reduce to semi-protection; only ~200 transclusions ([Edit=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (indefi
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:#if:x   <noinclude><!-- Remove surrounding whitespace --></noinclude>
| <noinclude><!-- Check for match with full pagename --></noinclude>
  {{{ {{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}   <noinclude><!-- Has data, or is empty but defined --></noinclude>
  | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "User:Somepage/+" --></noinclude>
    {{{ {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|1|1}}/+
    | <noinclude><!-- Else, are we on a subpage or a basepage? --></noinclude>
      {{safesubst:#if:{{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|2}}
      | <noinclude><!-- We are on a subpage, check for match with "User:Somepage/*" --></noinclude>
        {{{ {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|1|1}}/*
        | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "Somepage/*" --></noinclude>
          {{{ {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{safesubst:PAGENAME:{{{page|}}}}} | {{safesubst:PAGENAME}} }}|1|1}}/*
          | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "/something" --></noinclude>
            {{{ /{{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|-1}}
            | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "/somethin*" --></noinclude>
              {{{ /{{safesubst:lc: {{safesubst:padleft:|8| {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|-1}}# }} }}*
              | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "/someth*" --></noinclude>
                {{{ /{{safesubst:lc: {{safesubst:padleft:|6| {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|-1}}# }} }}*
                | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "/some*" --></noinclude>
                  {{{ /{{safesubst:lc: {{safesubst:padleft:|4| {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|-1}}# }} }}*   <noinclude><!-- Pad with # so "/a" doesn't match "/aaaa*" --></noinclude>
                  | {{{subpage| {{{other|}}} }}}   <noinclude><!-- Respecting empty parameter on purpose --></noinclude>
                  }}}
                }}}
              }}}
            }}}
          }}}
        }}}
      | <noinclude><!-- We are on a basepage, check for match with "Somepage" --></noinclude>
        {{{ {{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{safesubst:PAGENAME:{{{page|}}}}} | {{safesubst:PAGENAME}} }}
        | {{{basepage| {{{other|}}} }}}   <noinclude><!-- Respecting empty parameter on purpose --></noinclude>
        }}}
      }}   <noinclude><!-- End if, are we on a subpage or a basepage? --></noinclude>
    }}}
  }}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:#if:x   <noinclude><!-- Remove surrounding whitespace --></noinclude>
| <noinclude><!-- Check for match with full pagename --></noinclude>
  {{{ {{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}   <noinclude><!-- Has data, or is empty but defined --></noinclude>
  | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "User:Somepage/+" --></noinclude>
    {{{ {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|1|1}}/+
    | <noinclude><!-- Else, are we on a subpage or a basepage? --></noinclude>
      {{safesubst:#if:{{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|2}}
      | <noinclude><!-- We are on a subpage, check for match with "User:Somepage/*" --></noinclude>
        {{{ {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|1|1}}/*
        | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "Somepage/*" --></noinclude>
          {{{ {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{safesubst:PAGENAME:{{{page|}}}}} | {{safesubst:PAGENAME}} }}|1|1}}/*
          | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "/something" --></noinclude>
            {{{ /{{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|-1}}
            | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "/somethin*" --></noinclude>
              {{{ /{{safesubst:lc: {{safesubst:padleft:|8| {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|-1}}# }} }}*
              | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "/someth*" --></noinclude>
                {{{ /{{safesubst:lc: {{safesubst:padleft:|6| {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|-1}}# }} }}*
                | <noinclude><!-- Check for match with "/some*" --></noinclude>
                  {{{ /{{safesubst:lc: {{safesubst:padleft:|4| {{safesubst:#titleparts:{{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{{page|}}} | {{safesubst:FULLPAGENAME}} }}|0|-1}}# }} }}*   <noinclude><!-- Pad with # so "/a" doesn't match "/aaaa*" --></noinclude>
                  | {{{subpage| {{{other|}}} }}}   <noinclude><!-- Respecting empty parameter on purpose --></noinclude>
                  }}}
                }}}
              }}}
            }}}
          }}}
        }}}
      | <noinclude><!-- We are on a basepage, check for match with "Somepage" --></noinclude>
        {{{ {{safesubst:#if:{{{page|}}}| {{safesubst:PAGENAME:{{{page|}}}}} | {{safesubst:PAGENAME}} }}
        | {{{basepage| {{{other|}}} }}}   <noinclude><!-- Respecting empty parameter on purpose --></noinclude>
        }}}
      }}   <noinclude><!-- End if, are we on a subpage or a basepage? --></noinclude>
    }}}
  }}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
